title: ChainEdited payload
description: Emitted when a chain's content fields change via forge_edit(chain) — output, design_decisions, completion_condition, closure_summary, etc. Chain close emits ChainClosed (which carries the closure_summary as a load-bearing field); other edits emit this event with the updated_fields list. updated_values (added 2026-05-20 via T3 of agent-substrate-crud-retirement, §9.4) carries the post-edit values for each changed column so payload-only fold reconstruction can rebuild proj_chain_status without re-reading the CRUD row.

updated_fields.description: Snake-case names of the chain fields that changed in this edit. At least one entry — a no-op edit must not emit this event.

updated_values.description: Added 2026-05-20 via T3 of agent-substrate-crud-retirement (§9.4 audit finding). Map of changed-column-name → new value. Keys mirror updated_fields exactly; values carry the post-edit content for each column so the projection fold can reconstruct proj_chain_status from payload alone (T5's contract). Optional for backward compatibility with pre-T3 events; once T5 lands, every new event carries this.
